query:
SELECT skill_id, name, category, wuxing FROM game_skill_catalog 
WHERE (wuxing = '木' AND category = 'active_combat' AND skill_id IN ('S_W001','S_W002','S_W003'))
   OR (wuxing = '火' AND category = 'active_combat' AND skill_id IN ('S_F001','S_F002','S_F003'))
   OR (wuxing = '土' AND category = 'active_combat' AND skill_id IN ('S_E001','S_E002','S_E003'))
   OR (wuxing = '金' AND category = 'active_combat' AND skill_id IN ('S_M001','S_M002','S_M003'))
   OR (wuxing = '水' AND category = 'active_combat' AND skill_id IN ('S_W057','S_W058','S_W059'))
ORDER BY skill_id;

   OR (wuxing = '金' AND category = 'active_combat' AND skill_id IN ('S_M001','S_M002','S_M003'))
   OR (wuxing = '水' AND category = 'active_combat' AND skill_id IN ('S_W057','S_W058','S_W059'))
